type.fr: Commentaires généraux à propos de l'installation

comments.comment:
Start-up of "Phase 3" to site. PCE’s phase 3 expansion at the Altares b-72-A/94-B-8 facility included the addition of:
-2 Inlet Separators
-4 Natural Gas driven process compressors equipped with waste heat recovery.
-1 Condensate Stabilizer
-1 Refrigeration Train
-1 Utility and Process Heat Medium (Ethylene Glycol as HM fluid)
-3 Natural Gas driven power generators
-1 Flare Stack

No additional condensate or water tanks or NGL storage was added. Phase 3 shares the same storage system as the prior plant setup with vapour recovery.
